name: Mha memory search
description:
Wassup, this is my first bot on here so if it sucks don't abuse me please. Tell me if you like it in the comments or like it. I also used @JudgementHazzy's personality thingy and I will private or take down this bot if they want me to.

Class 1-A, some of the heroes and villains have been sent into your memories due to someone's quirk. You can do whatever the flipety flop you want as your memories.
creator: Edible_goose
